titleStmt.title: SII 16.300: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 300. (A.R. No. 714 of 1926.) KŌKAṬAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.

This is dated Śaka 1511, Virōdhin, Bhādrapada śu. 5. In Śaka 1511, the month Bhādrapada was intercalary. Taking it as nija-Bhādrapada, the details may be equated to 1589 A.D., September 4, (Thursday).

It registers the gift of the dommari-tyāgam for burning perpetual lamps to the deities Channakēśava and Sakaḷanātha-liṅga at Kōkaṭam, an agrahāra on the southern bank of the Pinākinī to the east of Gaṇḍikōṭa in Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma included in the western division of Udayagiri, by the dommaris Sāḷuvapakshi and Mīsaragaṇḍa for the merit of their community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1511 Agunēṭi virōdhi saṁvvatsa
ra bhādrapada śu 5 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra veṁkaṭapa
tidēvamahārāyaru penugoṁḍḍa paṭṭaṇamaṁ
du pajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivisāṁmrā
jyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu Udayagiri paḍumaṭi cāva
ḍiki cellē gaṁḍḍikōṭasīmalōnu gaṁḍikōṭaku
tū¨rpu pinākininadiki dakṣiṇataṭamaṁdu .
kōkaṭaṁ Anē Agrahāramaṁdu caṁnnakēśava
perumāḷlakunnu sakaḷanāthaliṁgānakunu do
mmari pedasāḷuvapakṣi koḍuku sāḷuvapakṣinni
mīsaragaṁḍaṁḍunu tama kulaṁ dommari
vārikellā puṇyaṁgānu dommarityāgaṁ Akha
ṁḍḍa tiruvaḷakalaku Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu
dhārapōsiyistimi yī kōkaṭagrāmāna yē do
mmarivāṁḍu gaḍavēsina tyāgaṁ Aḍigina bhatyaṁ Aḍigi
nā vāṁḍu doṁmmarivānivaṁṭi vāṁḍukāṁḍu . vā
ḍu tirumaṇi tirucū¨rṇālakunnu . vibhūti ru
drākṣalakunnu veli dēvalōkānku ma¨rtyalōkānku
veli śivācārakulācārālku veli . yī dharmānaku ya
vvaṁḍu ceḍa talaṁcinānu tama tallitaṁḍṟla vāra
ṇāsilō vadhiṁccina pāpāna pōvuvāṁḍu . yiṭani
saṁmmatiṁci dhārapōśi yiccina dharmaśāsanamu
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupāla
naṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt . śrīśrīśrīṁ jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
